ideal_must_detect.matched_text: not generally known to the market
acquire a 55% stake in Bay Zenith Digital Limited
no personal emails or phone numbers should be used or recorded

Positive MNPI (limited to this line): a draft board paper not released publicly authorises management to negotiate a non-binding term sheet to acquire a 55% stake in Bay Zenith Digital Limited; no timetable or consideration has been agreed and this is not generally known to the market.

External communications must rely only on published announcements, circulars (if any), and the 2024 annual report; analyst Q&A is to be limited to previously disseminated facts and stale guidance as appropriate.
